---
format: fgf-cv-typst
output-file: Garre-Frutos-CV
# Keep the intermediate cv.typ so the post-render step can recompile it into a
# dark-mode PDF (--input fgfdark=1). See scripts/build-cv-dark.mjs.
keep-typ: true
# Bundled fonts (IBM Plex Mono + Academicons + Font Awesome). The path is
# resolved relative to this document; without it Typst silently falls back to
# its serif default and to system icon fonts.
font-paths:
  - cv/_extensions/fgf-cv/fonts   # base = project root (full `quarto render`, CI deploy)
  - _extensions/fgf-cv/fonts      # base = cv/ (single-file render)
# Body is generated from data/cv.yml + data/papers.yml by scripts/build-cv.mjs
---

{{< include _cv-body.qmd >}}
